title: Reusable Travel Collage
sourceTitle: Algeria Travel Card Collage Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable travel collage poster with destination-led collage poster with landmark layering, cultural details, and campaign-style layout. Design a high-end collectible travel card visual in vertical 4:5 orientation, themed around Algeria. Show a hand gripping an exquisitely crafted Algeria collectible travel card (styled as a metro pass, museum pass, boarding pass, postcard, passport page). Card design details: local culture-inspired lettering informed by market textiles, mint tea, patterned ceramics, local food, and travel-stamp motifs, subtle gold foil accents, vintage transit motifs, decorative travel insignias, embossed surface. Destination: Algeria. Traveler: curious solo traveler in relaxed linen clothing carrying a small camera. Landmark Set: Sahara dunes, Algiers white architecture, Roman ruins, and Mediterranean coastline. Culture Details: market textiles, mint tea, patterned ceramics, local food, and travel-stamp motifs. Poster Palette: sun-washed turquoise, warm sand, tomato red, deep blue, and cream. Title Text: ALGERIA. Subject: Make curious solo traveler in relaxed linen clothing carrying a small camera the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in Algeria. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use destination-collage layout with traveler, landmark cluster, culture details, signage, food, transport, and title zone. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in premium travel-poster or collectible travel-card design with layered local identity cues. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use sun-washed turquoise, warm sand, tomato red, deep blue, and cream. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
